evals.notes: Direct cold-start trigger phrase — should always route to discovery-planning

evals.trigger: let's plan this out before building
evals.notes: Explicit planning intent before building — should route to discovery-planning, not prototype-builder

evals.trigger: I have an idea I want to explore
evals.notes: Open-ended exploration trigger — SME has an idea but no plan; should route to discovery-planning

evals.trigger: help me figure out what we're building
evals.notes: Uncertainty about scope — classic entry point for discovery-planning before any building
